---
title: "test_dialogue.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_dialogue.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.35
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.98
---

## Intent
The `test_dialogue.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_phrases_file, test_dialogue_engine_get, test_dialogue_engine_scoring. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_phrases_file, test_dialogue_engine_get, test_dialogue_engine_scoring. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.dialogue](file://src.core.engine.dialogue)

### Exports
- `mock_phrases_file`
- `test_dialogue_engine_get`
- `test_dialogue_engine_scoring`
